idea.hook: You're moving 1.3 MILLION miles per hour... right now!
facts: Earth's rotation: ~1,000 mph (1,670 km/h) at the equator.
Earth's orbit: ~67,000 mph (107,000 km/h) around the Sun.
Solar System's orbit: ~490,000 mph (790,000 km/h) around the Milky Way core.
Milky Way's motion: ~1.3 million mph (2.1 million km/h) relative to the Cosmic Microwave Background.
idea.payoff: You're a high-speed cosmic bullet, effortlessly hurtling through the universe!
idea.title: You're a 🚀 cosmic speed demon! 🤯

scenes.visual: A dark cosmic background with subtle, slow-moving stars. Text appears boldly.
A realistic rendering of Earth slowly spinning on its axis, filling most of the screen.

scenes.text: Earth's Orbit: ~67,000 mph around the Sun.
scenes.visual: A view of the Sun with Earth orbiting it quickly, showing its orbital path as a faint line.

scenes.text: Solar System's Orbit: ~490,000 mph around Milky Way.
scenes.visual: Our Solar System (Sun and planets as small dots) orbiting the hazy, spiral core of the Milky Way galaxy.

scenes.text: You're a high-speed cosmic bullet, hurtling through the universe!
scenes.visual: An abstract, energetic visual of streaking stars, simulating extreme velocity through space, as if the viewer is the bullet.
